Off Calendar Sep-03-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PETITIONER RIDERSSHARE INC.'S Motion For Attorney's Fees And Costs.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: PETITIONER RIDERSSHARE INC.'S Motion For Attorney's Fees And Costs is granted. No opposition filed.

Order and amended judgment submitted with the moving papers both signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/EPS)

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Jul-29-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER RIDERSSHARE INC.'S HEARING ON PETITION TO CONFIRM CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD.

Appearances: Fredrick Berry (no card provided) respondent and opposing party appearing in propria persona; No other appearances.

Discussed. Respondent did not provide notice to the Court or opposing counsel of his intent to contest the tentative ruling. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Grant. No opposition filed. Order and judgment are signed. Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR#6185, tonyvaughn@yahoo.com (302/EPS)
